case_title: STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. ROBERT C. WRIGHT et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR PUBLICATION OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY A CORPORATION
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY A CORPORATION SERVED JUL-31-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WRIGHT, ROBERT C. AN INDIVIDUAL
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR PUBLICATION OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY A CORPORATION
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-14-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT ON DEFENDANT(S) RYDER TRUCK RENTAL, INC.. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT WRIGHT, ROBERT C. AN INDIVIDUAL RYDER TRUCK RENTAL, INC. A CORPORATION DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-22-2013
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT RYDER TRUCK RENTAL, INC. A CORPORATION
MINUTE ORDER RE: DENYING WITHOUT PREJUDICE PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION FOR PUBLICATION OF SUMMONS

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-14-2013 CONTINUED TO AUG-20-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT RYDER TRUCK RENTAL, INC.; AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). THE MAY-14-2013 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT RYDER TRUCK RENTAL, INC. A CORPORATION
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-20-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
